title: Laelfe 12 Pcs Large Pink Roses Artificial Flowers, 53 cm Single Long Stem Faux Silk Pink Flowers Fake Roses for Wedding Bridal Bouquet Home Party Arrangment Hotel Decorations
features: 💐【Size Details: Larger Flower Head Than Competitors】These large pink roses artificial flowers have an overall length of approx. 53 cm/21 inches, and the flower head is about 4 inches/10 cm – 2 cm larger than most similar products on the market (their flower heads are only 8 cm). It’s close to the size of real roses, and stays vibrant without fading.

💐【Package Includings: Sufficient Quantity + Rich Colors】You will get 12 pcs of pink artificial roses in one package. Plus, we offer many popular colors to choose from (black, blue, red, yellow, green, white, pink, purple, etc.), so you can mix and match to fit your wedding, Christmas, or daily home decor style.

💐【High Quality: Realistic & Durable & Easy to Shape】These pink fake roses are made of 90% high-quality silk + 10% plastic (with metal wire as the skeleton inside the long stem, wrapped in plastic) – the silk petals feel soft and look lifelike, just like fresh roses. The stem can be freely trimmed to fit vases of different heights or bent to match your decor shape (e.g., bouquets, flower arches).

💐【Wide Range of Use: Perfect for Romantic Ambiance & Versatile Decor】This pink faux rose is ideal for creating a strong romantic vibe – many customers use it for key moments like Halloween, Gothic, engagement proposals, wedding ceremonies, Valentine’s Day surprises, anniversaries, or lover’s birthdays (no need to worry about fresh flowers wilting!).

💐【Easy to Maintain: No Hassle & DIY-Friendly】Unlike fresh roses that need watering, pruning, and wilt quickly, these silk pink roses require zero daily maintenance – perfect for busy people, plant beginners, or anyone with pollen allergies (no more sneezing from fresh flower pollen!). Plus, you can freely match them with other artificial flowers (starflowers, tulips, peonies, etc.) to DIY unique bouquets, flower arches, or table centerpieces – unleash your creativity without worrying about flowers fading or wilting.

The rose stem has artificial thorns please be carefull when touching. The stems are designed to be slightly longer .You can bend or prune them to the way you like.
